name: Hokuetsu Industries Co., Ltd.
summary: Hokuetsu Industries Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells air compressors under the AIRMAN brand in Japan and internationally. Its products include engine compressors, engine generators, motor compressors, scissors lifters, mini-excavators, and andengine driven welders. The company was founded in 1938 and is headquartered in Tsubame, Japan.
